description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The use of Discord is not required during Spell verification, as it primarily serves as a platform for public communication between Core Facilitators and members of the current Spell Team.
However, using Discord is highly recommended for Spell validators, as the communication history in the
#new-Spells channel may provide valuable context or additional information for the validation process.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling

diff: The use of Discord is not required during Spell verification, as it primarily serves as a platform for public communication between
and members of the current Spell Team.

However, using Discord is highly recommended for Spell validators, as the communication history in the #new-Spells channel may provide valuable context or additional information for the validation process.
